title: karpatiosorbus pseudolatifolia
intro: Karpatiosorbus pseudolatifolia is a plant species in the Rosaceae family, commonly known as a type of rowan or mountain ash. It is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Karpatiosorbus pseudolatifolia has been used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and digestive problems, and its herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and tinctures.
